title: Update man page
body:
Resolves https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/issues/12
- Fill out man page
- Remove TODO's from go code regarding man page
- Additional information on building instructions

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce jhonce@redhat.com

comments.body:
@runcom @mtrmac From reading the source this is my best guess. :)

Additionally, @runcom I could do a much better job of formatting the COMMANDS section if I just used the man macros rather than markdown.  If that is okay with you, please let me know and I'll convert to nroff.

> Additionally, @runcom I could do a much better job of formatting the COMMANDS section if I just used the man macros rather than markdown

I know this but I went with go-md2man since I didn't know man syntax :( I guess it's fine for me if you want to convert it (I'll learn the man syntax)
seems like this needs a rebase also

The sign-\* descriptions look good. I would, rather, like for documentation of these commands to come with a disclaimer “this is primarily for debugging; it should not be your normal operations workflow” (at least after we actually provide better tooling). I can prepare a PR after this one is merged.
do we need to remove go-md2man from the Makefile man target also right?
@runcom I removed the whole man target in the Makefile as it's not needed.
looks so fine to me :) thx Jhon (I'll make a note to update the spec files in RHEL/Fedora for this change)
